div.head: 76. Editorial Note
div.p:
Documentation on the Eleventh Session of the Contracting Parties to the General Agreement of Tariffs and Trade is in Department of State Central File 394.41 and ibid., GATT Files: Lot 59 D 563, Boxes 448–450; Lot 63 D 181, Box 271; and Lot 63 D 208, Boxes 272–273. The texts of the decisions, resolutions, and reports of the Eleventh Session are printed in Basic Instruments and Selected Documents, Fifth Supplement, January 1957. A list of the United States Delegation to the Eleventh Session, and an informal summary of the session results are printed in Department of State Bulletin, October 29, 1956, page 686, and ibid., December 3, 1956, page 893. A classified summary is in Current Economic Developments, No. 507, November
27, 1956, pages 6–14. (Department of State, Current Economic Developments: Lot 70 D 467)
